title: Easy GunPowderz
description: this mod adds gun powder recipe in blast furnace and its ez
body:
# 🧨 Craftable Gunpowder
A simple mod that lets you make gunpowder using a blast furnace. Perfect for survival, skyblocks, and peaceful mode!

# 🛠️ How it Works!

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f312074818ba09b6a9afbe14fd0c634eaf6d4b8.png)

**The Recipe:** Smelt Charcoal inside a **Blast Furnace** to get **Gunpowder**.

**Automation:** Works with hoppers so you can build automated gunpowder factories.

**Balance:** Requires a blast furnace and fuel, making it a fair alternative to hunting Creepers.
